title: ParkourPlus+
body:
**ParkourPlus** is a lightweight and beginner-friendly parkour plugin designed for simplicity, performance, and fun!
Players can start parkour automatically by stepping on a **pressure plate**, progress through **checkpoints**, and finish by reaching the **end plate**.
If they fall, they’ll instantly be **teleported back to their last checkpoint** - no commands needed!

Perfect for hub servers, adventure maps, or minigame worlds.


**Installation**

Download the latest version of **Parkour1.1.jar**

Place it in your /plugins folder

Start your server to generate the config

Adjust coordinates in config.yml

Restart and enjoy your parkour system


**Future Updates**
- In-game setup mode (/parkour setup)

- Titles & sounds support

- Timer & leaderboard system

- Multi-parkour support


**Support**

Need help or want to report a bug?
Join our Discord or send a DM on Spigot!
We respond quickly and are happy to help.
